case_title: SIMMONS STAIRWAYS, INC. VS. RONALD CHAUVEL et al

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS STAIRWAYS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUVEL, RONALD DBA BOLEX, LLC
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RONALD CHAUVEL, AND RONALD CHAUVEL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-25-2013 AT 3:30 PM.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,907.75 FILED BY SIMMONS STAIRWAYS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUVEL, RONALD DBA BOLEX, LLC CHAUVEL, RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) IS GRANTED JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUVEL, RONALD

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS STAIRWAYS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-13-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. " PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANT RONALD CHAUVEL DBA BOLEX, LLC AND RONALD CHAUVEL ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE BOLEX, LLC ONLY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT BY COURT CALL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY NICHOLE MONTROUIL--ACCOUNTING MANAGER. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING WITH THE AMENDED CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
